library.title: Law Library
library.description: Browse legislation, regulations, judgments, and legal articles available to your firm.
library.searchDescription: Full-text search across legislation, articles, and judgments.
library.annotationsHelp: Private notes visible only to you.
library.linkToCaseHelp: Attach this document as a legal authority in a case.
library.referencesHelp: Legal authorities and precedents linked to this case.
library.adminDescription: Manage categories and the document structure of the law library.
library.uploadDescription: Upload a legal source file and provide metadata for indexing.
library.allowedTypes: Allowed types: PDF, DOCX, JPG, PNG, TIFF
library.dropFile: Drop a file here or click to choose

research.title: Research Assistant
research.description: Ask legal questions in Arabic or English and receive AI-generated answers grounded in your library.
research.sessionsHelp: Your research conversations, sorted by most recent activity.
research.emptyHelp: Ask a legal question and the assistant will search the library for relevant authorities.
research.inputPlaceholder: Ask a legal question… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
research.limitExceeded: Monthly message limit reached. Contact your administrator.

dashboard.title: Daily operating dashboard
dashboard.description: Track upcoming hearings, overdue tasks, and recent activity from one authenticated workspace.

sections.upcomingHearingsHelp: The next scheduled court sessions across the firm.
sections.activityHelp: Audit activity from recent create, update, and status changes.

clients.title: Clients and contact history
clients.description: Capture key identifiers and the linked matter summary for each client.
clients.directoryHelp: Search across names and email addresses.
clients.createHelp: Start with core client identity fields. Secondary contacts can be expanded later.
clients.linkedSummaryHelp: Quick view of related cases, invoices, and documents.
clients.contactsHelp: People related to this client record.
clients.editHelp: Update client identity and contact details.
clients.duplicateWarning: A client with this information already exists: {{name}}

cases.title: Cases and structured work
cases.description: Manage case status, parties, assignments, related hearings, and follow-up tasks.
cases.directoryHelp: Open a matter to review tabs and related workstreams.
cases.createHelp: Capture the core court and filing references now, then fill the rest from the detail view.
cases.courtNoteAfterCreate: After creating the case, open the Courts tab to add court stages.
cases.courtsHelp: Track each court this case has passed through, in order.
cases.addCourtHelp: Attach a new court to the case progression.
cases.editCourtHelp: Update court details or mark the stage as ended.
cases.overviewHelp: Core metadata and workload summary for this case.
cases.partiesHelp: Track plaintiffs, defendants, counsel, and other participants.
cases.addPartyHelp: Add named participants and opposing counsel details.
cases.assignmentsHelp: Active team members responsible for this matter.
cases.assignLawyerHelp: Link a user to the matter with a specific case role.
cases.relatedTasksHelp: Open tasks connected to this matter.
cases.searchPlaceholder: Search by title or case number

quickIntake.title: Quick case intake
quickIntake.description: Create or pick a client, then open a case in one guided page.
quickIntake.clientStepHelp: Use an existing client or create one inline before case creation.
quickIntake.caseStepHelp: Capture the core case details to open the matter.
quickIntake.submitAll: Create case and save all sections
quickIntake.reviewHelp: Client and case shell are required. Other sections are optional and will be saved if filled.
quickIntake.optionalSummary: Optional entries queued — Courts: {{courts}}, Parties: {{parties}}, Assignments: {{assignments}}, Hearings: {{hearings}}, Tasks: {{tasks}}, Documents: {{documents}}
quickIntake.savedWithIssues: Case was created, but some sections failed: {{sections}}
quickIntake.courtsHelp: Add one or more court stages (optional).
quickIntake.partiesHelp: Add parties and opposing counsel details (optional).
quickIntake.assignmentsHelp: Assign team members to the case (optional).
quickIntake.statusHelp: Set a non-default status and optional note (optional).
quickIntake.hearingsHelp: Add initial hearings linked to this case (optional).
quickIntake.tasksHelp: Add follow-up tasks linked to this case (optional).
quickIntake.documentsHelp: Queue files to upload after the case is created (optional).
quickIntake.noCasePermission: You do not have permission to create cases.
quickIntake.noClientReadPermission: You do not have permission to select existing clients.
quickIntake.noClientCreatePermission: You do not have permission to create clients.

validation.caseRequired: Case title, number, and type are required.

hearings.title: Hearings and calendar planning
hearings.description: Move across month, week, and day views, then schedule or adjust sessions from the visible court calendar.
hearings.rangeHelp: Only the currently visible date range is loaded so the calendar stays fast on desktop and mobile.
hearings.legendHelp: Calendar cards are color-coded by assigned lawyer for this first release.
hearings.createHelp: Create a hearing from the selected day or slot and optionally link the next session.
hearings.editHelp: Adjust timing, assigned lawyer, outcome, and notes without leaving the calendar.
hearings.emptyRangeDescription: Pick another date range or schedule the next court session from the calendar.
hearings.conflictWarning: This lawyer already has a hearing around the selected time.

calendar.title: Unified Calendar
calendar.description: View hearings, invoices, and tasks in one planning timeline.

tasks.title: Tasks, deadlines, and review flow
tasks.description: Track standalone and case-linked tasks, then scan the kanban board by status.
tasks.boardHelp: Status columns keep priorities visible for the whole team.
tasks.createHelp: Assign due dates, ownership, and optional case linkage.
tasks.editHelp: View and update task status, assignment, and deadline.

users.title: Users and permissions
users.description: View firm users and manage local desktop onboarding where direct creation is allowed.
users.directoryHelp: Current team members and their role keys.
users.createHelp: Desktop mode can provision users directly without invitations.
users.manageHelp: Update identity, role, status, and reset password when needed.
users.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this user?
users.passwordHelp: Set a new password for this account.
users.cloudHelp: Cloud mode uses invitation-based onboarding instead of direct user creation.
users.cloudOnly: Direct creation is disabled in cloud mode
users.cloudOnlyHelp: Use the Invitations section to onboard users in cloud deployments.
users.seatLimitReached: Seat limit reached for this plan.

invitations.title: Invitations
invitations.description: Create, track, and revoke invitation tokens for cloud users.
invitations.directoryHelp: Track invitation status, expiry, and role assignment.
invitations.createHelp: Choose a role and issue a short-lived onboarding token.
invitations.cloudOnly: Invitations are unavailable in desktop mode
invitations.cloudOnlyHelp: Desktop mode creates users directly from the Users section.

settings.title: Firm context and session data

settings.sessionHelp: User identity and language data resolved from auth bootstrap.

settings.licensingHelp: Activate your license key and request edition changes.

settings.enterpriseContractOnly: Enterprise onboarding is contract-based and managed manually.
settings.administrationHelp: Manage firm-level lookup options and custom roles.
settings.integrationsHelp: Connect third-party services to enhance your workflow.

ppo.title: Egyptian Public Prosecution Portal
ppo.description: Launch the official PPO portal in a managed window/tab while keeping your ELMS workspace active.
ppo.launchSectionDescription: Open or refocus the PPO portal without leaving your current ELMS workflow.
ppo.sessionNote: PPO authentication is separate from ELMS. You may need to sign in again on the government portal.

status.openedTab: PPO portal opened in a new browser tab.
status.openedWindow: PPO portal opened in a managed desktop window.
status.focusedWindow: Focused your existing PPO managed window.

starting.title: Starting local services
starting.description: ELMS is initializing embedded PostgreSQL and the local backend before opening the working shell.

recovering.title: Recovering local services
recovering.description: The local backend exited unexpectedly. ELMS is attempting an automatic restart.

failed.title: Startup needs attention
failed.description: The desktop runtime did not recover. Review the local environment and try startup again.

lookups.title: Lookup options
lookups.description: Manage the dropdown values used across the system. System-defined values are read-only; custom values are firm-specific.

lookups.optionsListHelp: System rows are greyed out and cannot be deleted.
lookups.addOptionHelp: New options are visible only to your firm.
lookups.editOptionHelp: Update labels or deactivate the option.

roles.title: Roles and permissions
roles.description: Manage firm roles and their permission sets. System roles are read-only.

roles.editHelp: Update the role name and permission set.
roles.identityHelp: The key is permanent; only the display name can be changed after creation.
roles.permissionsHelp: Select the permissions granted to this role.
roles.firmRolesHelp: Roles created by your firm — editable and deletable.
roles.deleteConfirm: Delete this role? This cannot be undone if users are assigned.
roles.systemRoleEditHelp: Only custom firm roles can be modified.
